reviews.comment:
Es buenísima , tiene muchos lugares para carga , si está completo la de colon te das la vuelta manzana y tiene más , además un buen lugar para tomar un café , es un complejo muy grande

(Translated by Google)
It's excellent, it has many charging stations; if the one on Colon is full, you can just walk around the block and there are more. It's also a good place to have a coffee; it's a very large complex.
